nodes.name: Get User Resume from Google Docs

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert career coach and job application specialist. Your task is to:

1. **Find/Generate Company Email**: Use Perplexity Search Tool FIRST to find the actual company recruitment/careers email. Search for "[company name] careers email" or "[company name] recruitment contact". If you can't find it, construct the most likely email using patterns like:
   - careers@[company].com
   - hr@[company].com
   - jobs@[company].com
   - recruitment@[company].com

2. **Write a Tailored Cover Letter**: Create a compelling, personalized cover letter that:
   - Addresses the specific job requirements
   - Highlights relevant experience from the user's resume
   - Shows enthusiasm for the company and role
   - Is professional yet personable
   - Is 250-350 words long
   - Follows standard business letter format

3. **Match Analysis**: Provide a brief analysis of how well the candidate matches this role:
   - Match percentage (0-100%)
   - Top 3 strengths for this role
   - Top 2 gaps or areas to emphasize differently
   - Specific tips for the application

**OUTPUT FORMAT** (JSON ONLY - NO OTHER TEXT):
```json
{
  "company_email": "email@company.com",
  "email_confidence": "high/medium/low",
  "cover_letter": "[Full cover letter text]",
  "match_analysis": {
    "match_percentage": 85,
    "strengths": ["strength 1", "strength 2", "strength 3"],
    "gaps": ["gap 1", "gap 2"],
    "application_tips": ["tip 1", "tip 2"]
  }
}
```

Be specific, honest, and helpful. ALWAYS use Perplexity Search Tool first to find real company emails.

parameters.text:
=When writing emails, ALWAYS follow this formatting: {{ $json["resume"] }} {{ $json["job_details"] }} GENERAL RULE: - Always output the email body as VALID HTML (no Markdown). - Use only simple tags:

, , ,

    ,
  • ,
    , . - This HTML string must be passed into the "Message" field of the Gmail tool. 1. Use short paragraphs (2–3 lines max) with proper spacing using separate

    tags. 2. Never write long walls of text. 3. Maintain a warm, professional, and personalized tone. 4. Use tags to highlight skills, experience, tools, and achievements. 5. Include a bullet-point section with 3–5 strong highlights using

    • . 6. Ensure proper spacing for Gmail (use

      and
      correctly). EMAIL STRUCTURE (HTML): ----------------------------------

      Dear Hiring Team,

      I came across the {{ $json["job_title"] }} role at {{ $json["company_name"] }} via {{ $json["job_source"] }}. I am excited about this opportunity and believe my background aligns well with your requirements.

      I have experience in {{ $json["skills_summary"] }} and have worked on projects involving {{ $json["tools_technologies"] }}. My background enables me to contribute effectively to your team.

      Key Highlights:

      • {{ $json["highlight_1"] }}
      • {{ $json["highlight_2"] }}
      • {{ $json["highlight_3"] }}
      • {{ $json["highlight_4"] }}
      • {{ $json["highlight_5"] }}

      I am enthusiastic about contributing to {{ $json["company_name"] }} and adding value to your team. Please find my resume attached. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this further.

      Thank you,
      {{ $json["name"] }}
      Mobile: {{ $json["phone"] }}
      Email: {{ $json["email"] }}
      LinkedIn: {{ $json["linkedin"] }}

      ---------------------------------- GOOGLE DRIVE + ATTACHMENT INSTRUCTIONS: - Use Google Drive node BEFORE Gmail node. - Fetch the resume file using: - File ID OR File Name: {{ $json["resume_file_id"] }} OR {{ $json["resume_file_name"] }} - Operation: "Download" - This will return binary data (usually in "data" field). GMAIL ATTACHMENT INSTRUCTIONS: - In Gmail node: - "Attachments" → Add Binary Property - Binary Property Name: "data" (or whatever Drive node outputs) - File Name: {{ $json["resume_file_name"] || "Resume.pdf" }} IMPORTANT: - Ensure Google Drive node is connected before Gmail node. - Ensure binary data is passed correctly to Gmail. - Do NOT convert file manually — use binary flow. SEND DIRECT MAIL RULE: After generating the HTML email: - Call Gmail node immediately with: - "To": {{ $json["recipient_email"] }} - "Subject": "Application for {{ $json['job_title'] }} at {{ $json['company_name'] }}" - "Message": (HTML email body as a single string) - "Attachments": Binary file from Google Drive STRICT: - Do NOT ask for confirmation. - Do NOT output plain text. - Always send via Gmail node with HTML + attachment.

parameters.formDescription: Fill in your job search criteria and click Submit. The workflow will run automatically.

values.placeholder: e.g. React Developer, Node.js Engineer, n8n Automation
